title: Sentinel Outbound Event
description: Events Sentinel emits to Anoryx-AI-Orchestrator (and onward to Delta) over the Redis Streams bus. Every variant carries the four stable IDs from contracts/ids.md (LOCKED, IMMUTABLE) plus event_id, event_timestamp, and request_id. These IDs are the join key between Sentinel events and Delta records. NORMATIVE DISPATCH: variant selection is determined SOLELY by oneOf plus the event_type const on each variant; the const values are unique and the variants are mutually exclusive, so exactly one matches a valid record. VALIDATOR DIALECT: Sentinel, Anoryx-AI-Orchestrator, and Delta MUST all validate these records with a JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validator so no parser-differential exists. All objects are closed (additionalProperties:false) and all fields are bounded (maxLength/maximum/maxItems) per the F-001 audit findings: closed schemas remove a silent smuggling channel and bounded fields remove a DoS-via-inspection vector. Attribution carried on events is always the server-resolved value (see contracts/openapi.yaml virtual-API-key key-to-ID binding and id_context_mismatch), never a raw client-supplied header.
$comment: Dispatch is normative via oneOf + the event_type const on each variant under JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. The 'discriminator' keyword below is a NON-NORMATIVE hint for OpenAPI tooling ONLY; it is not a 2020-12 keyword and has NO validation effect under this dialect. Do not rely on it for correctness.

tenant_id.description: Stable tenant identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md. Server-resolved value, not a raw client header.

team_id.description: Stable team identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md.

project_id.description: Stable project identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md.

agent_id.description: Internal Sentinel component name (lowercase slug). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md. NOT the end-user AI model name.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event (UUID v4). Deduplication key on the bus.

event_timestamp.description: Event emission time (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC).

request_id.description: Correlation ID matching the originating gateway request (X-Request-Id in contracts/openapi.yaml). Links the event back to the request that produced it. Charset is restricted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

UsageEvent.description: Per-request token/cost/latency usage record. Drives the Delta client-side cost estimate; cost_estimate_cents is an estimate, not an authoritative bill.

model.description: End-user AI model name reported by the gateway (e.g. the value sent in the request body).

cost_estimate_cents.description: Client-side cost estimate in cents. Estimate only; not an authoritative bill.

PiiBlockedEvent.description: Emitted when the data-protection engine detects and acts on PII.

pattern_name.description: Name of the PII detection pattern that matched (e.g. 'us_ssn', 'email'). Never the matched value.

severity.description: Severity of the detected PII exposure.

sample_excerpt_redacted.description: OPTIONAL already-redacted excerpt for audit context. This field is intended to be ALREADY REDACTED by the data-protection engine before emission; it MUST NEVER contain raw PII or the matched value. The pattern is a MARKER-PRESENCE check ONLY: it requires a redaction marker ('[REDACTED]' or '***') somewhere in the value. It does NOT guarantee the ABSENCE of raw PII and provides NO structural prevention of raw PII riding alongside a marker. Full PII suppression is the emitter's runtime obligation, not a schema guarantee. Consumers MUST treat this field as potentially-unsafe display data requiring consumer-side validation before rendering or storage. Emitters that cannot guarantee redaction MUST omit this field.

InjectionDetectedEvent.description: Emitted when the defense engine flags a prompt-injection attempt.

rule_matched.description: Identifier of the detection rule that matched. Never the offending input text.

SecretLeakedEvent.description: Emitted when the defense engine detects a secret in traffic.

secret_type.description: Classification of the detected secret. The secret value itself is NEVER emitted.

direction.description: Traffic direction in which the secret was detected (inbound to model vs outbound to client).

PolicyViolatedEvent.description: Emitted when a Delta-sourced policy (contracts/policy.schema.json) is violated at the gateway.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the violated policy (UUID v4); joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

violation_type.description: Classification of the violation (e.g. 'budget_exceeded', 'model_denied'). Charset is restricted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

ComplianceCheckedEvent.description: Emitted when a compliance control is evaluated for audit-ready evidence. 'status' reports the result of an individual control check; it does NOT assert certification or overall compliance.

framework.description: Audit framework the control belongs to.

control_id.description: Framework-specific control identifier. Charset is restricted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

status.description: Result of this individual control check. Audit-ready evidence, not a certification claim.

ShadowAiDetectedEvent.description: Emitted when traffic to an unsanctioned (shadow) AI endpoint is observed.

detected_endpoint.description: PII-SAFETY: host (and optionally path) of the detected shadow AI endpoint ONLY. Emitters MUST NOT log full URLs: query strings and fragments may carry API keys, tokens, or PII. Strip query params, fragments, and userinfo before emission. Structurally enforced: the value MUST NOT contain '?', '#', '@', or whitespace, so query strings, fragments, and userinfo cannot ride along. Bounded to 256 chars to cap inspection cost.

traffic_volume.description: Observed request count to the shadow endpoint over the detection window.

first_seen_at.description: When traffic to this endpoint was first observed (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC).

RoutingDecisionEvent.description: Emitted by the multi-provider model router (F-006, ADR-0008) when it makes a routing decision: provider selection, allow-list denial, cost-ceiling block, a fallback attempt, or chain exhaustion. NOT a Delta policy violation (that is policy_violated, reserved per ADR-0007). agent_id is the emitting component slug 'gateway-core' (the router runs inside the gateway), NEVER a provider or model name; the provider is carried in selected_provider. No provider credential, API key, or upstream body text is EVER carried on this event.

routing_reason.description: Lowercase slug for why this decision was made (e.g. 'tenant-allowlist', 'cost-routing', 'fallback-transient', 'fallback-rate-limit'). Charset restricted to a slug to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

selected_provider.description: The upstream provider chosen for THIS routing decision. Never a model name; never a credential.

outcome.description: The routing outcome for this decision.

attempt_index.description: Zero-based index of this attempt in the fallback chain (0 = primary). Bounded to 16 to cap inspection cost (DoS-via-inspection defense).

requested_model.description: The model the client requested (echo for correlation). Never a secret.

action_taken.description: Disposition the router applied: 'routed' (served by selected_provider), 'blocked' (allow-list/cost terminal), 'failed_over' (retryable failure, advancing the fallback chain).

PolicyIntakeAcceptedEvent.description: Emitted by F-008 policy intake (ADR-0009) when a Delta-signed policy record is verified, scope-resolved (the verified signature claims are authoritative; body IDs are a cross-check only), version-fresh, persisted, and audited. agent_id is the emitting component slug 'gateway-core'. Carries NO signature material, key material, or raw policy plaintext; policy_id is a join hint to contracts/policy.schema.json.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the accepted policy; joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

PolicyIntakeRejectedSignatureEvent.description: Emitted by F-008 policy intake when signature verification fails (absent/malformed/wrong-alg/wrong-key) or no verifying key is configured (fail-closed). No tenant is resolvable, so the four IDs are the reserved system-sentinel values (zero-UUID tenant/team/project, 'gateway-core' agent) per ADR-0009 Decision B. Carries NO signature bytes.

violation_type.description: Reason slug (e.g. 'signature.invalid', 'signature.no_key'). Charset restricted to forbid control chars/whitespace (log-injection defense).

PolicyIntakeRejectedScopeMismatchEvent.description: Emitted by F-008 policy intake when the verified signature scope disagrees with the record body, or the signature claims the forbidden wildcard tenant. Attributed to the signature-resolved tenant when one exists, else the system-sentinel IDs (ADR-0009 Decision B). violation_type carries ONLY the mismatched-dimension slug — the raw disputed body IDs are NEVER emitted (they go to structured logs keyed by request_id).

policy_id.description: Identifier of the policy, when resolvable; joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

violation_type.description: Mismatched-dimension slug (e.g. 'scope_mismatch.tenant_id', 'scope_mismatch.wildcard_tenant'). Never the disputed raw IDs.

PolicyIntakeRejectedReplayEvent.description: Emitted by F-008 policy intake when policy_version is not strictly greater than the stored max for the policy_id (replay/rollback defense). The signature is valid, so it is attributed to the signature-resolved tenant.

policy_id.description: Identifier of the replayed policy; joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

violation_type.description: Reason slug (e.g. 'replay'). No stored-version value is leaked here.

PolicyIntakeRejectedSchemaEvent.description: Emitted by F-008 policy intake when the record fails Draft 2020-12 schema validation (unparseable, oversized, missing field, additionalProperties poisoning, wrong variant). No signature is parsed, so it is attributed to the system-sentinel IDs (ADR-0009 Decision B).

PolicyDecisionAllowEvent.description: Emitted at request time (F-006 router, F-008 enforcement) when a model allow-list policy permitted the requested model for the request scope. agent_id is 'gateway-core'. NOT a Delta policy violation (that is policy_violated).

policy_id.description: Identifier of the allow-list policy that applied; joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

requested_model.description: The model the client requested (echo). Never a secret.

PolicyDecisionDenyEvent.description: Emitted at request time (F-006 router, F-008 enforcement) when a model deny-list (deny precedence over allow), an absent-from-allow-list condition, or a budget ceiling terminally blocked the request for the scope. agent_id is 'gateway-core'. NOT a Delta policy violation (that is policy_violated).

policy_id.description: Identifier of the policy that denied the request; joins to contracts/policy.schema.json policy_id.

requested_model.description: The model the client requested (echo). Never a secret.

PromptInjectionDetectedMlEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) when the LLM-as-judge injection classifier produced a usable verdict for a prompt. final_score is the fused score = max(classifier_score regex component, judge_score). agent_id is the emitting component slug 'gateway-core'; judge_model is the judge's model name, NEVER a credential. No raw prompt text is carried: rule_matched is a stable rule id and the offending input is never emitted.

classifier_score.description: Normalized injection-likelihood score in [0,1] from the regex/heuristic component.

judge_score.description: Normalized injection-likelihood score in [0,1] from the LLM judge verdict.

judge_confidence.description: Judge-reported confidence in its verdict, normalized to [0,1].

judge_model.description: Judge model name (e.g. 'claude-haiku-4-5'). Never a credential.

final_score.description: Fused decision score in [0,1] = max(classifier_score, judge_score).

audit_mode.description: Audit-evidence mode in effect when this verdict was recorded.

rule_matched.description: OPTIONAL stable identifier of the detection rule that contributed. Never the offending input text.

ClassifierUnconfiguredEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) when the LLM-as-judge classifier is not configured (e.g. no preset/model wired) and therefore could not be invoked for a prompt. Detect-and-audit only: the gateway records the gap; it is NOT an injection verdict. agent_id is 'gateway-core'. No raw prompt text or credential is carried.

classifier_reason.description: OPTIONAL lowercase slug for why the classifier was unconfigured (e.g. 'no_preset'). Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

ClassifierDegradedEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) when the LLM-as-judge classifier ran in a degraded mode (e.g. partial/timed-out verdict that could not be fused into a usable score). Detect-and-audit only: it is NOT an injection verdict. agent_id is 'gateway-core'. No raw prompt text or credential is carried.

classifier_reason.description: OPTIONAL lowercase slug for why the classifier was degraded (e.g. 'partial_verdict'). Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

ClassifierInvocationFailedEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) when invoking the LLM-as-judge classifier failed outright (e.g. transport error, upstream error, no response). Detect-and-audit only: it is NOT an injection verdict. agent_id is 'gateway-core'. No raw prompt text or credential is carried.

classifier_reason.description: OPTIONAL lowercase slug for why invocation failed (e.g. 'upstream_error', 'timeout'). Charset restricted to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

ShadowAiDetectedOutboundEvent.description: Emitted by the F-007 (ADR-0010) egress monitor when outbound traffic targets a disallowed AI provider endpoint (shadow-AI egress). Detect-and-audit only: the monitor does NOT block. agent_id is 'gateway-core'; selected_provider is the disallowed provider the egress targeted, never a credential.

detected_endpoint.description: PII-SAFETY: host (and optionally path) of the detected shadow AI endpoint ONLY. Emitters MUST NOT log full URLs: query strings and fragments may carry API keys, tokens, or PII. Strip query params, fragments, and userinfo before emission. Structurally enforced: the value MUST NOT contain '?', '#', '@', or whitespace, so query strings, fragments, and userinfo cannot ride along. Bounded to 256 chars to cap inspection cost.

traffic_volume.description: Observed request count to the shadow endpoint over the detection window.

first_seen_at.description: When traffic to this endpoint was first observed (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC).

selected_provider.description: The disallowed upstream provider the egress targeted. Never a model name; never a credential.

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (detect-and-audit only; the monitor does not block).

RecursiveInjectionAttemptEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) when a prompt is detected to target the classifier surface itself (a recursive/meta injection aimed at the judge). agent_id is 'gateway-core'. No raw prompt text is carried: rule_matched is a stable rule id and the offending input is never emitted.

rule_matched.description: OPTIONAL stable identifier of the detection rule that matched. Never the offending input text.

JudgeBillingEvent.description: Emitted by F-007 (ADR-0010) as a cost-audit trail of a single LLM-as-judge invocation. cost_estimate_cents is a CLIENT-SIDE COST ESTIMATE, not an authoritative bill. agent_id is 'gateway-core'; selected_provider/judge_model/judge_preset are the judge provider and model, never credentials. No raw prompt text is carried.

judge_preset.description: Judge preset identifier (e.g. 'anthropic:claude-haiku-4-5'). Never a credential.

judge_model.description: Judge model name. Never a credential.

selected_provider.description: The judge upstream provider. Never a model name; never a credential.

cost_estimate_cents.description: Client-side cost estimate in cents for this judge invocation. Estimate only; not an authoritative bill.

judge_outcome.description: Outcome of the judge invocation being billed.

RateLimitDegradedEvent.description: Emitted by F-009 (ADR-0011 §7) when the Redis-backed rate limiter falls back to the in-process limiter on a Redis connection/timeout failure (failure mode γ). Detect-and-audit only: enforcement continues per-worker on the legacy path; this event records the degradation transition. Emitted with the triggering request's REAL four IDs when raised on the admission path; emitted with the reserved system IDs (tenant/team/project = WILDCARD_UUID, agent_id = 'rate-limiter') when raised by the background health loop (see contracts/ids.md, third documented WILDCARD_UUID use). Carries ONLY the Redis error class/module for forensics — NEVER the exception message, which may contain a host, port, or credential.

redis_error_class.description: OPTIONAL Redis exception class name (e.g. 'ConnectionError', 'TimeoutError') from type(exc).__name__. Forensic only. NEVER the exception message (it may leak a host/port/credential).

redis_error_module.description: OPTIONAL module of the Redis exception class (e.g. 'redis.exceptions') from type(exc).__module__. Forensic only. NEVER the exception message.

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (detect-and-audit only; the limiter continues enforcing on the in-process fallback path).

RateLimitRecoveredEvent.description: Emitted by F-009 (ADR-0011 §7) when the background health loop observes Redis returning to health and the limiter resumes the Redis-backed primary path (failure mode γ recovery). Detect-and-audit only. Always a system-emitted event with no request context, so it carries the reserved system IDs (tenant/team/project = WILDCARD_UUID, agent_id = 'rate-limiter'); see contracts/ids.md (third documented WILDCARD_UUID use). tenant_id = WILDCARD_UUID here denotes 'the Sentinel system itself', never a cross-tenant grant.

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (detect-and-audit only; the Redis-backed primary path has resumed).

RateLimitRedisErrorEvent.description: Emitted by F-009 (ADR-0011 §7) on the admission path per distinct Redis error encountered by the rate limiter (forensic trail, distinct from the once-per-outage rate_limit_degraded transition). Detect-and-audit only: enforcement continues per-worker on the legacy path. Carries the triggering request's REAL four IDs. Carries ONLY the Redis error class/module for forensics — NEVER the exception message, which may contain a host, port, or credential.

redis_error_class.description: OPTIONAL Redis exception class name (e.g. 'ConnectionError', 'TimeoutError') from type(exc).__name__. Forensic only. NEVER the exception message (it may leak a host/port/credential).

redis_error_module.description: OPTIONAL module of the Redis exception class (e.g. 'redis.exceptions') from type(exc).__module__. Forensic only. NEVER the exception message.

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (detect-and-audit only; the limiter continues enforcing on the in-process fallback path).

ComplianceEvidenceGeneratedEvent.description: Emitted by F-011 (ADR-0013) after a tenant-scoped compliance evidence summary is generated over events_audit_log for a window. agent_id is the emitting component slug 'compliance-engine'. Carries the caller's REAL four IDs (a tenant generating evidence over its own data, NOT WILDCARD_UUID). Metadata only — NO payloads, prompt content, PII, or secrets. framework/framework_version describe which framework mapping was evaluated. This is audit-ready evidence, not a certification claim.

framework.description: Audit framework the evidence summary was generated for. v1 supports SOC2 and ISO27001 only. NOTE: this enum is local to the F-011 compliance meta-event variants and is deliberately distinct from ComplianceCheckedEvent.framework (which is unchanged).

framework_version.description: Pinned framework mapping version copied verbatim from the version-controlled mapping YAML (e.g. '2017-TSC-rev2022'). Charset restricted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (a meta-audit record of an evidence-summary generation; the generation path itself issues zero writes to events_audit_log).

CompliancePackExportedEvent.description: Emitted by F-011 (ADR-0013) after a tenant-scoped, ECDSA-signed compliance evidence pack ZIP is exported. agent_id is the emitting component slug 'compliance-engine'. Carries the caller's REAL four IDs (a tenant exporting evidence over its own data, NOT WILDCARD_UUID). Metadata only — NO payloads, prompt content, PII, or secrets. pack_content_hash is the forensic linkage to the exported ZIP. This is audit-ready evidence, not a certification claim.

framework.description: Audit framework the exported pack was generated for. v1 supports SOC2 and ISO27001 only. NOTE: this enum is local to the F-011 compliance meta-event variants and is deliberately distinct from ComplianceCheckedEvent.framework (which is unchanged).

framework_version.description: Pinned framework mapping version copied verbatim from the version-controlled mapping YAML (e.g. '2017-TSC-rev2022'). Charset restricted to [A-Za-z0-9._-] to forbid control characters and whitespace (log-injection defense).

action_taken.description: Disposition: 'logged' (a meta-audit record of a pack export).

pack_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical signed pack (forensic linkage to the exported ZIP). Never a payload.
